---
title: Vegetable
subtitle: A subtitle
format:
  revealjs: 
    theme: simple
author:
  - name: Thiyanga S. Talagala
    email: 
    affiliations: University of Sri Jayewardenepura, Sri Lanka
date: last-modified
---

## Markets

## Background of the Study

- Vegetables are a key component of daily diet in Sri Lanka.

- Vegetable price differences are not random. 

- Vegetable prices fluctuate frequently due to:
    
    - Seasonal production patterns
    
    - Weather conditions
    
    - Supply chain disruptions
    
## Study Locations

## High Vegetable Grown Districts

## Pettah and Dambulla Markets

## Data

## Exploratory Data Analysis

##
